# Antiparos View Villas

> Five Cycladic-style self-catering villas with a shared pool and panoramic Aegean sea views in Antiparos, Cyclades, Greece. Family-run by Anna, rated 9.6/10 on Booking.com. No booking engine; inquiries via contact form, WhatsApp, email, or phone.

## About

Antiparos View Villas is a small, family-run accommodation offering five individually styled villas on a hilltop in Antiparos island, Cyclades, Greece. Each villa has sea views, a fully equipped kitchen, private balcony or terrace, air conditioning, and free WiFi. Guests share an outdoor pool with panoramic views of Paros and the Aegean Sea. The property is known for its warm, personal hospitality: a stocked fridge and homemade treats on arrival, free port pickup, daily cleaning, and beach towels.

- Location: Antiparos, Cyclades, Greece (37.0333, 25.0677)
- Season: May 1 to September 30
- Villas: 5 (from 2 to 5 guests each)
- Languages: Greek, English, Italian
- Rating: 9.6/10 Booking.com, 4.9/5 Google

## Villas

- Villa 1: Studio, 2 guests, double bed, sea view balcony
- Villa 2: Studio, 2 guests, double bed, rooftop terrace
- Villa 5: Apartment, 3 guests, double bed + single, kitchen, balcony
- Villa 3: Family apartment, 4 guests, double bed + 2 singles, full kitchen
- Villa 4: Maisonette (2 floors), 5 guests, double bed + 3 singles, living room, two bathrooms

## Amenities

Pool, free WiFi, free parking, free port pickup, air conditioning, fully equipped kitchen, daily cleaning, homemade welcome package, BBQ, garden, beach towels, pool towels, iron, hairdryer, safe box, satellite TV.

## Key Information

- Check-in: after 14:30
- Check-out: before 12:00
- Minimum stay July/August: 1 week (Saturday or Sunday check-in/out)
- Extra person: +15 EUR per night
- Deposit: 30% within 7 days of booking
- Cancellation: Free cancellation up to 14 days before arrival
- Pets: Not allowed
- Payment: Cash, bank transfer

## Contact

- Email: info@antiparosview.gr
- Phone: +30 697 731 0167
- WhatsApp: +30 697 731 0167
- Website: https://antiparosview.gr/

## Distances

- Antiparos town center: 1.5 km
- Antiparos port: 2 km
- Paros airport: 12 km (ferry + drive)
- Pounta port (ferry Paros-Antiparos): 9 km
- Nearest beach (Psaraliki): 2 km
- Nearest supermarket: 1.5 km
- Nearest restaurants: 1.5 km
